questions.objective_ref: Define role assignment and explain what placing a role statement in a system prompt tells the model.
Write a basic role statement using the 'You are a [role]' pattern and insert it into the system parameter of an Anthropic API call.
Explain how a role statement changes a model's tone, vocabulary, and level of expertise in its replies.
Distinguish situations where role assignment improves output quality from situations where it has little or no measurable effect.
Identify two common mistakes made when writing role statements and state how to avoid them.
Distinguish situations where role assignment improves output quality from situations where it has little or no measurable effect.
